title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises:
Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Luminous Power Technologies International Enterprises!
